title: Media enquiries :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
Information for media organisations on how to contact the Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment (MBIE) media team.
Media organisations can contact the MBIE media team:
Do not use this email address for queries about your visa application.
We require a privacy waiver to provide information about individual cases. We will accept an email or a signed letter from the visa applicant (or parent/dependent on behalf), authorising us to discuss the case with you. Please provide the applicant's full name, date of birth and client number if known.
